title: Methodology for forecasting electricity consumption by Grey and Vector autoregressive models
author: Guefano, Tamba, et al.
description: Highlights•The Grey and Vector autoregressive models are coupled to improve their accuracy.•Five economic and demographic parameters are included in the new hybrid model.•This new model is a reliable forecasting tool for assessing energy demand.

steps_raw.title: Method details
steps_raw.instruction: In this section, we have set to describe the various steps that are require for modeling and forecasting electricity consumption from each of the previous models.
